name: Maxim Dokalenko

bio: Maxim Dokalenko is a DJ and promoter based in Prague, carving out a space where raw industrial textures meet hypnotic dancefloor energy.

With two decades behind the decks, Maxim has played clubs, festivals and rave parties across Czechia, Slovakia, Austria and Russia known for long-form sets that take listeners on a journey — never settling, always evolving.
Ehhhh this Claude agent has a good guess lol. Anyways I'm currently out of free tokens, so the contact form will be built next time.
Meanwhile you can contact me on Mix/Sound clouds. For bookings as well as if you'd like to have your own site on this open-source project.
